category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes gcalcli as Google Calendar Command Line Interface.
source_facts.description says it accesses Google Calendar from the command line.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gcalcli; official repository title is insanum/gcalcli.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface for installation, authentication, and usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project URL and the official repository page identifies the project.
tags_sources: Official repository describes it as a Python command-line interface for Google Calendar.
source_facts.description identifies Google Calendar CLI access.
